title: Bolsius Grave Light - White with Motif - Pack of 12 - Lily - Length Burning Time 70 Hours - Funeral Candle & Memorial Candles - Clean Burning - Without Palm Oil
features: Enjoy the warmth and comfort of our memorial light products designed to create a soothing ambience for your outdoor devotional with a strong and stable flame that burns bright and long and leaves no traces of soot or smoke.
The bright white colour of this candle provides a fresh accent in your decor and is timeless. You can therefore combine them perfectly with all other colours from the bolsius candle range.

Since 1870, bolsius has been producing high-quality candles and fragrances with which you can create an atmosphere of cosiness and well-being in your home. We do this with passion, know-how and with respect for people and planet. bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that excite your senses. Make every moment special. For you, and for everyone around you.
description: From the manufacturer Bolsius - Memorial Lights Experience the warmth of our memorial lights – designed to burn bright, long, and clean in all weather. Made in the EU without palm oil, each product reflects care for the planet and your loved ones. With thoughtful details, and a RAL safety certificate, they offer a safe, meaningful glow at the cemetery or in the garden. Let every flame shine with lasting love and remembrance.
